headline: Chevron CEO Wirth on Oil Prices, Strait of Hormuz, Venezuela
summary: Chevron Chairman & CEO Mike Wirth discusses the impact of the war in Iran on oil prices and global supplies, multiple attacks this week on vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz, the company's view on Venezuela, and potential oil and gasoline shortages. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance."

headline: Chevron Weighs Tengiz Setback Against Greek Offshore Growth Potential
summary: Chevron reported an accident at its Tengiz oilfield that has led to a drop in production from one of its largest global assets. The company has also moved to acquire a 70% stake and operatorship in a major offshore exploration block in southwestern Greece. These developments come as Chevron trades at $182.46, with the stock up 17.0% year to date and 39.1% over the past year. For investors watching NYSE:CVX, the Tengiz disruption directly affects a core production hub, so any change in...
